goal: Implement the first rollout of machine-owned verdicts for Phase6 and verify it with regression tests.

tasks.title: Prepare active handoff and create the rollout task list
tasks.notes: Use the plan file as the ordered checklist for this rollout.

tasks.title: Add a Phase6 verdict finalizer and wire it into validation
tasks.notes: Infer canonical verdict from verification checks and tests_failed before validator/commit.

tasks.title: Slim the Phase6 prompt so AI focuses on primitives instead of top-level verdict logic
tasks.notes: Keep output compatibility, but clarify that checklist accuracy is primary and engine finalizes the canonical verdict.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for Phase6 machine-owned verdict behavior
tasks.notes: Cover pass, warning, fail, missing rollback_phase, missing conditional_go_reasons, and legacy verdict override.

tasks.title: Run regression tests and record the results
tasks.notes: Only the parent agent performs final verification.
